---
title: "Follow-up Dashboard"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-21"
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(shiny)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(plotly)
  library(DT)
  library(readr)
  library(scales)
  library(stringr)
})
```

```{r}
# Update this path if needed
data_path <- "/Users/tianjiah/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-MichiganStateUniversity/Data Manager/Data-Manager/Follow-up Dashboard/dashboard_detail.csv"

data <- read_csv(
  data_path,
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    eligible_flag = as.numeric(eligible_flag),
    Score = as.numeric(Score)
  )
```

```{r}
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Follow-up Team Dashboard"),

  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      width = 3,
      selectInput(
        "staff",
        "Select staff:",
        choices = c("All", sort(unique(na.omit(data$staff)))),
        selected = "All"
      ),

      selectInput(
        "event_short",
        "Select event:",
        choices = c("All", sort(unique(na.omit(data$event_short)))),
        selected = "All"
      ),

      selectInput(
        "statusId",
        "Select statusId:",
        choices = c("All", sort(unique(na.omit(data$statusId)))),
        selected = "All"
      )
    ),

    mainPanel(
      width = 9,
      style = "height: 92vh; overflow-y: auto;",

      fluidRow(
        column(
          width = 4,
          wellPanel(
            h4("Denominator"),
            textOutput("denominator")
          )
        ),
        column(
          width = 4,
          wellPanel(
            h4("Numerator"),
            textOutput("numerator")
          )
        ),
        column(
          width = 4,
          wellPanel(
            h4("Progress"),
            textOutput("progress")
          )
        )
      ),

      tabsetPanel(
        tabPanel(
          "Progress by Staff",
          div(
            style = "height: 68vh;",
            plotlyOutput("progress_by_staff", height = "100%")
          )
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Progress by Event",
          div(
            style = "height: 68vh;",
            plotlyOutput("progress_by_event", height = "100%")
          )
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Staff x Event Heatmap",
          div(
            style = "height: 72vh;",
            plotlyOutput("heatmap", height = "100%")
          )
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Summary Table",
          DTOutput("summary_table")
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Detail Data",
          DTOutput("data_table")
        )
      )
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  filtered_data <- reactive({
    df <- data

    if (input$staff != "All") {
      df <- df %>% filter(staff == input$staff)
    }

    if (input$event_short != "All") {
      df <- df %>% filter(event_short == input$event_short)
    }

    if (input$statusId != "All") {
      df <- df %>% filter(statusId == input$statusId)
    }

    df
  })

  summary_data <- reactive({
    filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(staff, event_short) %>%
      summarise(
        denominator = sum(eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        numerator = sum(if_else(eligible_flag == 1, coalesce(Score, 0), 0), na.rm = TRUE),
        progress = if_else(denominator > 0, numerator / denominator, NA_real_),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      arrange(staff, event_short)
  })

  output$denominator <- renderText({
    sum(filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  })

  output$numerator <- renderText({
    sum(
      if_else(
        filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1,
        coalesce(filtered_data()$Score, 0),
        0
      ),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  })

  output$progress <- renderText({
    denom <- sum(filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    num <- sum(
      if_else(
        filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1,
        coalesce(filtered_data()$Score, 0),
        0
      ),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )

    if (denom == 0) {
      "NA"
    } else {
      percent(num / denom, accuracy = 0.1)
    }
  })

  output$progress_by_staff <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(staff) %>%
      summarise(
        denominator = sum(eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        numerator = sum(if_else(eligible_flag == 1, coalesce(Score, 0), 0), na.rm = TRUE),
        progress = if_else(denominator > 0, numerator / denominator, NA_real_),
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(staff, progress), y = progress)) +
      geom_col() +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
      labs(
        title = "Progress by Staff",
        x = "Staff",
        y = "Progress"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()

    ggplotly(p) %>%
      layout(autosize = TRUE)
  })

  output$progress_by_event <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(event_short) %>%
      summarise(
        denominator = sum(eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        numerator = sum(if_else(eligible_flag == 1, coalesce(Score, 0), 0), na.rm = TRUE),
        progress = if_else(denominator > 0, numerator / denominator, NA_real_),
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(event_short, progress), y = progress)) +
      geom_col() +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
      labs(
        title = "Progress by Event",
        x = "Event",
        y = "Progress"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
      )

    ggplotly(p) %>%
      layout(autosize = TRUE)
  })

  output$heatmap <- renderPlotly({
    df <- summary_data()

    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = event_short, y = staff, fill = progress)) +
      geom_tile() +
      scale_fill_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
      labs(
        title = "Staff by Event Progress Heatmap",
        x = "Event",
        y = "Staff",
        fill = "Progress"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
      )

    ggplotly(p) %>%
      layout(autosize = TRUE)
  })

  output$summary_table <- renderDT({
    datatable(
      summary_data() %>%
        mutate(progress = percent(progress, accuracy = 0.1)),
      rownames = FALSE,
      options = list(
        pageLength = 20,
        scrollX = TRUE
      )
    )
  })

  output$data_table <- renderDT({
    datatable(
      filtered_data(),
      rownames = FALSE,
      options = list(
        pageLength = 20,
        scrollX = TRUE
      )
    )
  })
}
```

```{r}
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```
